mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (user_id, schedule_id, status, register_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{scheduleId}, #{status}, #{registerTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, p.name as project_name, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.venue FROM registration r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, p.name as project_name, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.venue FROM registration r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.register_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, p.name as project_name, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.venue FROM registration r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE r.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY r.register_time ASC

SELECT r.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, p.name as project_name, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.venue FROM registration r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.schedule_id = #{scheduleId}

SELECT r.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, p.name as project_name, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.venue FROM registration r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id ORDER BY r.register_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM registration WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
